name: Kevin Ryan
bio: Kevin Ryan is listed as a Democratic candidate in Illinois' 2026 U.S. Senate primary field. His candidacy appears in statewide ballot reporting for the March 17 primary. (Source: Shaw Local primary ballot guide, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: FEC totals pending direct ETL import.
